title: PhD: Electrical property mapping of the human body using magnetic resonance imaging (MRI)
description:
Funding: **Fully funded doctoral contract**
Start: Ideally October 2026, open for negotiation
Topic: Developing new MRI methods to map electrical properties of human tissues (tumor detection & treatment planning) (see attachment for details: [OffreThèse_IADI_IRM_propriétés_électriques_2026.docx](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27217940/OffreThese_IADI_IRM_proprietes_electriques_2026.docx))
MRI lab with access to clinical 1.5T & research 3T MRI scanners
Supervisor: Freddy Odille (Inserm Research Director)
Profile: Master's or engineering degree (biomedical eng., physics, maths, or data science) · Matlab/Python · English proficiency
French: **Not required**

Apply: CV + cover letter → <freddy.odille@inserm.fr>
